---
name: 'User Story 1 '
about: "(Runner / Visitor)"
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

In order to **share my opinion on running events** as a **site visitor**, I can **vote in a poll and leave a comment (anonymously if I choose)**.

**Acceptance Criteria**

- The poll must be displayed on the homepage for all site visitors.
- The user must be able to select one poll option and submit their vote.
